preserved_evidence: Filename/title identify DOW-UAP-D27, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023; body timeline and UAP fields are June 2024
implication: Use D27 as source ID and June 2024 body timeline for event analysis; retain October 2023 title as release metadata caveat.

preserved_evidence: Initial contact and DoD acquisition date are 070457:00ZJUN24
implication: Useful for matching to mission logs and PR29 source material.

preserved_evidence: Printed as 060457ZJUN2024-CENTCOM while initial contact is 070457:00ZJUN24
implication: Preserve both values; do not silently normalize the serial to the contact date.

preserved_evidence: Operation ENDURING SENTINEL; USCENTCOM / 609th; AFSOC / 3 SOS; ISR mission; OMAM takeoff and landing
implication: Places the event in a real mission timeline, not a standalone visual anecdote.

preserved_evidence: Target pod AN/DAS-1, FMV-supported NIB windows, and DVIDS PR29 infrared video DOD_111688964
implication: D27 is the report-content match to PR29, but DVIDS labels the accompanying report D8.

preserved_evidence: Glowing hot spherical object with vertical unwavering cylindrical pole/bar; possible reflection from the object in water
analytic_status: strong report claim; visually plausible in PR29
implication: Use as report/video-alignment description, not proof of a physical appendage.

preserved_evidence: Flying straight just over water; response to observer actions NO CHANGE
implication: Supports over-water straight-flight lane, not a full trajectory reconstruction.

preserved_evidence: UAP kinetic velocity is 140 KNOTS with estimated accuracy
implication: Do not independently validate physical speed without FOV, range, platform motion, and telemetry.

preserved_evidence: Friendly aircraft altitude 23,999FT, speed 163 KNOTS, trajectory 294, location in redacted 40RFM60 lane
implication: Do not treat these fields as UAP altitude/speed/trajectory.

preserved_evidence: First coordinate redacted 40RFM60 lane with first accuracy Precise; last coordinate redacted 40QFM92 lane with last accuracy Estimated and last seen radius 5
implication: Useful lane-level geospatial evidence, but exact coordinates are redacted.

preserved_evidence: Observer assessment benign; no interrogation; no observer engagement; no effects on persons; no recovered material; advanced capabilities/materials marked NO
implication: Supports unresolved benign observation lane; does not close reflection/platform/sensor explanations.

preserved_evidence: DVIDS PR29 names D8, but PR29 body summary matches D27 and conflicts with local/War.gov D8
implication: Treat DOD_111688964 as hard PR29 media and D27 as written-report content match unless an official correction appears.

preserved_evidence: Public MP4/report lack source FOV, slant range, platform/gimbal motion, raw telemetry, and exact track data
implication: Keep 140 KNOTS report-derived; no public physical-performance claim is defensible.
